name: maxandersen-skills
description: Custom skills for Claude Code: Google API CLIs, social media automation with Zernio, and JBang-first data processing
author: Max Rydahl Andersen

skills.name: zernio-cli
skills.description: Use when user wants to post to social media (Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Bluesky, etc.), schedule posts across platforms, or manage social media content via Zernio

skills.name: prefer-jbang-automation
skills.description: Use when about to use jq, curl, sed, awk, or bash for JSON/XML processing, API calls, data transformation, or file processing - before writing any bash commands for data manipulation

skills.name: using-maven-worktrees
skills.description: Use when creating git worktrees for Maven projects - prevents SNAPSHOT artifact clashes and corporate plugin resolution failures through isolated local repositories

skills.name: jgccli
skills.description: Google Calendar CLI (Java) for listing calendars, viewing/creating/updating events, and checking availability

skills.name: jgmcli
skills.description: Gmail CLI (Java) for searching emails, reading threads, sending messages, managing drafts, and handling labels/attachments

skills.name: jgdcli
skills.description: Google Drive CLI (Java) for listing, searching, uploading, downloading, and sharing files and folders
